$comment: Canonical source: content/schemas/galaxy-tool-discovery.schema.json in jmchilton/foundry. Derived copies under packages/galaxy-tool-discovery-schema/src/ are regenerated by scripts/sync-schema.mjs — do not edit those by hand.
title: Galaxy Tool Discovery Recommendation
description: Structured recommendation emitted by the discover-shed-tool Mold after searching the Galaxy Tool Shed and resolving any selected candidate to a pinnable Tool Shed version and changeset revision.

DiscoveryRecommendation.title: DiscoveryRecommendation
DiscoveryRecommendation.description: Top-level output from discover-shed-tool. A hit or weak result carries a selected candidate; a miss carries null candidate plus fallthrough rationale.

status.description: Recommendation class. hit means proceed with the selected Tool Shed pin; weak means candidate exists but needs confirmation or may fall through; miss means no usable wrapper was found.

candidate.description: Selected candidate for hit/weak results. Null for miss.

alternates.description: Runner-up candidates worth surfacing to the user or harness. Empty when no plausible alternates were found.

rationale.description: Short explanation of why this status and candidate were selected, including ambiguity or fallthrough reasoning.

warnings.description: Advisory issues that do not invalidate the recommendation but affect confidence or downstream binding.

ToolCandidate.title: ToolCandidate
ToolCandidate.description: One Tool Shed candidate plus the version and changeset pin needed by downstream caching and gxformat2 authoring.

tool_shed_url.description: Tool Shed base URL searched, normally https://toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu.

owner.description: Tool Shed repository owner, e.g. devteam or iuc.

repo.description: Tool Shed repository name containing the wrapper. Maps from gxwf search's repoName field.

tool_id.description: Galaxy XML tool id inside the repository.

trs_tool_id.description: Tool Shed TRS-style id: <owner>~<repo>~<tool_id>. Used for gxwf tool-versions and tool-revisions.

version.description: Selected Galaxy XML tool version, usually the newest installable version unless the caller requested a specific version.

changeset_revision.description: Selected Tool Shed Mercurial changeset revision for reproducible gxformat2 tool_shed_repository pinning.

score.description: Search score or cast-skill confidence score used to rank this candidate. Higher is better.

matched_terms.description: Query terms or exact hints that matched this candidate. Empty only when the candidate came from a non-lexical hint.

match_fields.description: Candidate fields or hints that matched the query. Preserves the older sketch's name/description-style evidence separately from matched_terms.

rationale.description: Candidate-specific explanation, especially for alternates and weak recommendations.

Warning.title: Warning
Warning.description: Advisory confidence issue surfaced by discover-shed-tool.
